'''鈭歞-d-j''' ('''kadadaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rinch|rinch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rinch|rinch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-d-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadadaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadaj|thidadaj]] || [[word:jidadaj|jidadaj]] || [[word:shidadaj|shidadaj]] || [[word:kidadaj|kidadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudadaj|thuthudadaj]] || [[word:jujudadaj|jujudadaj]] || [[word:shushudadaj|shushudadaj]] || [[word:kukudadaj|kukudadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudadaj|thudadaj]] || [[word:judadaj|judadaj]] || [[word:shudadaj|shudadaj]] || [[word:kudadaj|kudadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudadaj|thudadaj]] || [[word:judadaj|judadaj]] || [[word:shudadaj|shudadaj]] || [[word:kudadaj|kudadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedadaj|thedadaj]] || [[word:jedadaj|jedadaj]] || [[word:shedadaj|shedadaj]] || [[word:kedadaj|kedadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodadaj|thothodadaj]] || [[word:jojodadaj|jojodadaj]] || [[word:shoshodadaj|shoshodadaj]] || [[word:kokodadaj|kokodadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodadaj|thodadaj]] || [[word:jodadaj|jodadaj]] || [[word:shodadaj|shodadaj]] || [[word:kodadaj|kodadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodadaj|thodadaj]] || [[word:jodadaj|jodadaj]] || [[word:shodadaj|shodadaj]] || [[word:kodadaj|kodadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dadaj|th忙dadaj]] || [[word:j忙dadaj|j忙dadaj]] || [[word:sh忙dadaj|sh忙dadaj]] || [[word:k忙dadaj|k忙dadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadadaj|thathadadaj]] || [[word:jajadadaj|jajadadaj]] || [[word:shashadadaj|shashadadaj]] || [[word:kakadadaj|kakadadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadadaj|thadadaj]] || [[word:jadadaj|jadadaj]] || [[word:shadadaj|shadadaj]] || [[word:kadadaj|kadadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadadaj|thadadaj]] || [[word:jadadaj|jadadaj]] || [[word:shadadaj|shadadaj]] || [[word:kadadaj|kadadaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadadaj|shadadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadadaj|goshadadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadadaj|gokishadadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadadajn眉|shadadajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadadajnkn眉|goshadadajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadajn眉|gokishadadajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadadajsh毛|shadadajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadadajnksh毛|goshadadajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadadajsh毛|gokishadadajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadajro|shadadajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadajnkro|goshadadajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadajro|gokishadadajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadajmu|shadadajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadajnkmu|goshadadajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadajmu|gokishadadajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadadajsher|shadadajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadadajnksher|goshadadajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadadajsher|gokishadadajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadadajng|shadadajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadadajnkng|goshadadajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadadajng|gokishadadajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadadajya|shadadajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadadajnkya|goshadadajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadadajya|gokishadadajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadadajyam|shadadajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadadajnkyam|goshadadajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadadajyam|gokishadadajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadadajn眉sh毛|shadadajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadadajnkn眉sh毛|goshadadajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadadajn眉sh毛|gokishadadajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadajn眉ro|shadadajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadajnkn眉ro|goshadadajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadajn眉ro|gokishadadajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadajn眉mu|shadadajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadajnkn眉mu|goshadadajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadajn眉mu|gokishadadajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadadajsh毛n眉|shadadajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadadajnksh毛n眉|goshadadajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadajsh毛n眉|gokishadadajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadajsh毛ro|shadadajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadajnksh毛ro|goshadadajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadajsh毛ro|gokishadadajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadajsh毛mu|shadadajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadajnksh毛mu|goshadadajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadajsh毛mu|gokishadadajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadadajron眉|shadadajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadadajnkron眉|goshadadajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadajron眉|gokishadadajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadadajrosh毛|shadadajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadadajnkrosh毛|goshadadajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadadajrosh毛|gokishadadajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadadajromu|shadadajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadadajnkromu|goshadadajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadadajromu|gokishadadajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadadajmun眉|shadadajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadadajnkmun眉|goshadadajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadadajmun眉|gokishadadajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadadajmush毛|shadadajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadadajnkmush毛|goshadadajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadadajmush毛|gokishadadajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadadajmuro|shadadajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadadajnkmuro|goshadadajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadadajmuro|gokishadadajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
